title: centaurea × sagarrae
intro: Centaurea × sagarrae, a perennial herb, is a hybrid species derived from the cross between Centaurea corymbosa and Centaurea solstitialis. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea × sagarrae include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
